assertionResults.reason: Mission session state captures missionDir from ProposeMission results when available, persists missionBaseSessionId alongside missionDir, and targeted restart-fallback coverage proves fallback resolution uses the documented base/original session id path when the original notification-provided path is unavailable.
evidence: Targeted tests passed: test/rpcNotificationMapping.test.ts :: applyRpcNotification captures missionDir from ProposeMission tool_result notifications

frictions.description: The restorable Mission session available in the isolated Electron UI was a previously saved foundation-validation Mission session rather than the active validator-injected mission tied to the live missionDir under /Users/clive/.factory/missions/a340063e-1391-4186-b698-8db9955f8eda.
frictions.resolution: Used the real Electron UI for a Mission-surface coherence sanity check, then validated the assigned recovery assertions with the active live missionDir plus focused passing tests that directly cover capture, fallback, merge, and late-file behavior.

frictions.description: The saved Mission session used for UI sanity proof persisted missionDir metadata for /Users/clive/.factory/missions/a901a190-5925-431e-8657-8db9bb502391, but that specific historical missionDir no longer exists on disk.
frictions.resolution: Used that session only for real-surface coherence proof and relied on the active live missionDir plus focused tests for current disk-backed recovery behavior.

summary: Validated 3 assigned missionDir/watch/reconciliation assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Strongest evidence was the passing targeted recovery suite in test/missionDirWatcher.test.ts, test/sessionStore.test.ts, and test/rpcNotificationMapping.test.ts, reinforced by persisted Mission metadata in /tmp/droi-mission-e2e/sessions/a901a190-5925-431e-8657-8db9bb502391.json, the live active mission directory at /Users/clive/.factory/missions/a340063e-1391-4186-b698-8db9955f8eda, and Electron sanity screenshots /tmp/droi-mission-e2e/missiondir-watch-ui.png and /tmp/droi-mission-e2e/missiondir-watch-session.png with no console errors observed.
